meta.title: NutriVibe — AI Food Scanner & Calorie Counter for iPhone
meta.description: AI food scanner that counts calories from a photo. Track macros, water, fasting and weight with your AI nutrition coach. Free for iPhone and Apple Watch.
meta.ogAlt: NutriVibe app on iPhone showing AI food tracking
meta.keywords: AI food scanner, calorie counter app, food scanner app, AI calorie tracker, photo food tracker, macro tracker, nutrition app, meal scanner, calorie counter iPhone, NutriVibe, intermittent fasting, Apple Health

hero.title: The
hero.subtitle: Snap a photo and get instant calories and macros. NutriVibe tracks your meals, water and fasting, and keeps you motivated with an AI coach that actually gets you.
hero.screenshotAlt: NutriVibe Today dashboard with calories, macros and hydration

features.title: Everything you need to eat well
features.subtitle: Powerful tracking made effortless — so healthy habits finally stick.

today.name: Your nutrition at a glance
today.description: Calorie ring, macros, hydration and fasting in one calm Today dashboard.

logging.name: Smart Food Logging
logging.description: Log meals in seconds with a huge Open Food Facts database and a built-in barcode scanner.

aiScan.name: AI Food Scanner
aiScan.description: Snap a meal for instant calories and macros. Uses 1 AI credit per scan (included in AI Pro’s 100/month bucket).

water.name: Water Tracking
water.description: Hit daily hydration goals with quick-add cups that sync with Apple Health.

macros.name: Macro & Calorie Goals
macros.description: Get a personalized macro calculator with daily targets for protein, carbs and fat.

fasting.name: Intermittent Fasting
fasting.description: Run flexible fasting plans with a live timer and metabolic stage insights.

progress.name: Progress & Body Tracking
progress.description: Track weight and measurements with clean Apple-style charts and Apple Health sync.

recipes.name: Recipes & AI Suggest
recipes.description: Browse recipes with Pro. AI Suggest: describe a craving to search the database (0 credits) or generate a full recipe (1 credit).

progressCalories.name: Calorie trends
progressCalories.description: Line and bar charts for daily intake vs your goal — spot patterns at a glance.

progressWeight.name: Weight tracking
progressWeight.description: Log weight over weeks and months with a clear goal line and Apple Health sync.

foodSearch.name: Search & log food
foodSearch.description: Search Open Food Facts, scan barcodes, filter by meal and add foods in seconds.

foodDetails.name: Rich food details
foodDetails.description: Nutri-Score, macros per serving, smart portions and Vibe tips before you log.

watch.name: Apple Watch App
watch.description: Log water, start fasts and check your day right from your wrist.

coach.name: Vibe AI Coach
coach.description: A motivating mascot that reads your habits and turns them into clear next steps.

sync.name: Cloud Sync
sync.description: Your data stays securely in sync across all of your devices.

howItWorks.title: Healthy habits in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Start today and see momentum build within the first week.

one.title: Set your goals
one.description: Tell NutriVibe your goal and preferences. We build your personalized calorie and macro plan.

two.title: Log with AI
two.description: Snap a photo, scan a barcode or search. Logging a meal takes just seconds.

three.title: Watch your progress
three.description: See clear trends, keep your streak, and let Vibe keep you motivated every day.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Pro is full premium without monthly AI. AI Pro adds photo scan and 100 credits per month.
pricing.creditsBody: AI Pro: 100 credits per calendar month (photo scan, text log, AI recipe, goal plan and more — usually 1 credit each). Weekly AI Coach on AI Pro does not cost an extra credit. Pro and Free have no monthly pool — 3 welcome scans once, then scan packs (10 / 30 / 100, never expire) or a rewarded video for +1 scan. Daily cap: up to 15 AI actions when you have credits (Free/Pro), up to 50 on AI Pro.
pricing.recipeAiNote: Recipes tab requires Pro. “Find in database” uses 0 credits; generating an AI recipe uses 1.
pricing.footnote: Prices in USD are a guide; the App Store shows your local currency. Pro: 1-week free trial on first subscription where Apple offers it. Scan packs: $1.99 (10), $4.99 (30), $14.99 (100). Subscriptions renew automatically. NutriVibe is not medical advice.

free.name: Free
features: Up to 10 foods per day, water & macro calculator
Scan packs or rewarded video for more AI

pro.name: Pro
features: AI recipe search — 0 credits (Recipes tab is Pro)
AI photo scan — with AI Pro or scan packs

aiPro.name: AI Pro
features: AI photo scan — camera, calories & macros
100 AI credits per month (shared pool, not unlimited)
When used up: scan packs or next month

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

privacy.question: Is my data private and secure?
privacy.answer: Yes. Your data is encrypted and securely synced. We never sell your personal information, and you can export or delete your data at any time.

languages.question: Which languages are supported?
languages.answer: NutriVibe is fully available in English, Bulgarian, German and Romanian, with more on the way.

devices.question: Which devices does it work on?
devices.answer: NutriVibe runs on iPhone and includes a dedicated Apple Watch app, with secure cloud sync across your devices.

appleHealth.question: Does it sync with Apple Health?
appleHealth.answer: Yes. Water, weight, nutrition and activity can sync both ways with Apple Health.

aiAccuracy.question: How do AI credits and scans work?
aiAccuracy.answer: Free: up to 10 foods per day and 3 welcome AI scans once. Pro: unlimited logging, Recipes and fasting, but no monthly AI credits — photo AI needs AI Pro or scan packs. AI Pro: 100 credits per month for scan, text log, AI recipe and more (usually 1 credit each). Recipe search: 0 credits; generating a recipe: 1. App Store prices are in your local currency.

subscription.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
subscription.answer: Absolutely. Manage or cancel your subscription anytime in the App Store — no questions asked.

vibe.name: Vibe
vibe.pricing: Pick the plan that fits you ✨
vibe.faq: Ask away — I nudge you in the app too.

finalCta.title: Start your healthiest chapter today
finalCta.subtitle: Download NutriVibe free and let your AI coach turn small wins into lasting habits.

footer.tagline: Eat smart. Move often. Live vibrant.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what NutriVibe collects, how it is used, and the control you have over your data.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.body: We collect the nutrition, activity and profile information you choose to add so we can provide tracking, insights and personalized goals.

use.title: How we use your data
use.body: Your data powers your dashboards, AI insights and progress. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

control.title: Your choices
control.body: You can export or permanently delete your data at any time from within the app or by contacting our support team.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using NutriVibe you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

use.title: Using NutriVibe
use.body: NutriVibe provides nutrition tracking and educational guidance and is not a substitute for professional medical advice.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Premium subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period via the App Store.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: NutriVibe is provided on an as-is basis. Always consult a healthcare professional before making significant dietary changes.
